test.name: Login And Navigate to engagement

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Given L'utilisateur se trouve sur la page "Plateformes métier"
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Vérifie que l'utilisateur est sur la page "Plateformes métier".

kw.name: When L'utilisateur sélectionne l'option "PRIOS Agriculture" dans la section "Plateformes métier"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Sélectionne l'option "PRIOS Agriculture" sur la page.

kw.name: Then Il est redirigé vers une nouvelle page avec les menus de navigation
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Vérifie que la nouvelle page contient le texte spécifique pour confirmer la redirection.

kw.name: Then Les menus de navigation affichent les options suivantes dans les premières "8" options :
Get Window Handles
kw.doc: Returns all child window handles of the selected browser as a list.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Vérification de l'option : PRIOS Satelit (SATF AS)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: return document.evaluate("//*[contains(text(), '${option}')]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue;
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Execute Javascript

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log
kw.msg: Option PRIOS A-M Prix de revient trouvée.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
Vérifie que les 8 options spécifiées sont présentes dans le menu.

kw.name: When L'utilisateur clique sur "PRIOS A-M Ventes"
Execute Javascript
kw.arg: document.evaluate("//*[contains(text(), 'PRIOS A-M Ventes')]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.scrollIntoView(true);
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Sélectionne l'option "PRIOS A-M Ventes" sur la page.

kw.name: When L'utilisateur choisit "Engagements" dans la deuxième colonne
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.evaluate("(//*[contains(text(), 'Engagements')])[1]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.click() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Sélectionne l'option "Ordres de livraison" sur la page.

kw.name: When L'utilisateur sélectionne "Engagements" dans la troisième colonne
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.evaluate("(//*[contains(text(), 'Engagements')])[2]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.click() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Sélectionne l'option "Ordres de livraison" sur la page.

kw.name: Then L'utilisateur est redirigé vers un formulaire contenant une liste d'engagements vide
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Engagements de ventes - Sté PRIOS - Etablissement CARQUEFOU
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Engagements de ventes - Sté PRIOS - Etablissement CARQUEFOU
kw.arg: Engagements de ventes - Sté PRIOS - Etablissement CARQUEFOU
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: When L'utilisateur clique sur le bouton '+' ou clique droit dans la liste et sélectionne "Nouveau"
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: document.evaluate("//img[contains(@class, 'a-image') and contains(@src, 'CB8CF15EBC54179FBC57E708D9C763D9')]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null).singleNodeValue.scrollIntoView(true);
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Sélectionne l'option "le bouton +" sur la page.

kw.name: Then L'utilisateur est redirigé vers l'entête engagement avec le formulaire
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log

test.doc: Connectez-vous et naviguez vers la transformation OL en BL
